Step 2 interprets “something” to mean any medal type and aggregates all nations with a zero in any medal column, without selecting a specific column or applying a row/column selection to target the query. This leap leads to an over-inclusive answer and lacks a justified transformation step tied to the functions provided. Step 2 is incorrect.
